creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mikhail T. from comment #6)
> comments
Ah, I understand the reason of indentatiton. Are they necessary? The info about installing documentation is really-really unnecessary - and IMHO the others too.

> patches
Yes, I see their names. Now the order of patches is irrelevant. But later?
Idea: as I see patch of epoll.cpp divided by two small patches. Merge them into one and add short comments before every blocks.
See https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#slow-patch-rules 
The patch-md5, patch-test.cpp are okay.

> Actually, it looks looks like pkubaj@ fixed this port similarly:
I didn't remove CXXFLAGS, see line 20 :)
